executable.title: Build Slide Classifier
executable.description: Train a slide-level classifier from TRIDENT embeddings. Reads the folder's _aiExperiment metadata (classes) and per-item _aiSplit and _slideClassifierLabel metadata, fits a classifier, and posts metrics and predictions back to Girder.

string.name: folder_id
string.label: Experiment Folder ID
string.description: Girder folder containing the Slide Classifier configuration and items with assigned splits and labels.

string-enumeration.name: feature_kind
string-enumeration.label: Feature Source
string-enumeration.description: How to obtain a fixed-size embedding per slide. "mean_pool_patch" averages the patch embeddings stored at meta.trident.features_h5. "slide" uses a slide-level encoder output.

string.name: slide_encoder
string.label: Slide Encoder Name
string.description: When Feature Source is "slide", the slide-encoder folder name (looks for <coords_dir>/slide_features_<slide_encoder>/<stem>.h5). Ignored otherwise.

string-enumeration.name: model_type
string-enumeration.label: Model
string-enumeration.description: Classifier head trained on the embeddings.

string-enumeration.name: task_type
string-enumeration.label: Task Type
string-enumeration.description: "multilabel" trains an independent binary classifier per class. "multiclass" trains a single classifier where each slide belongs to exactly one class.

double.name: regularization
double.label: Regularization (C)
double.description: Inverse regularization strength for logistic regression.

string.name: job_dir
string.label: Output Directory
string.description: Container-internal path where model.pkl, metrics.json, and predictions.csv will be written.

string.name: output_folder_id
string.label: Results Folder
string.description: Girder folder ID where the run results item will be created. Leave empty to use the invoking user's Private folder.

parameters.label: Girder API URL and Key
parameters.description: Auto-injected by Slicer CLI Web; do not set manually.
